economic_notes: Band owns 1,035 of 4,004,150 limited partnership units in Gwich'in Investments Limited Partnership (GILP), which carries a 13.34% investment in Denendeh Investments Limited Partnership. Related party relationship with Tsiigehtchic Charter Community via common management.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. Audit report dated March 17, 2022 for year ended March 31, 2021. Band is located in Tsiigehtchic, Northwest Territories. Accumulated deficit of $258,494 at year end. Large due-to-related-party balance of $889,302 owed to Tsiigehtchic Charter Community, unsecured, non-interest bearing with no set repayment terms — represents significant liquidity risk. GBE investment in Gwich'in Investments Limited Partnership carried at $121 (cost). ISC funding labelled as CIRNAC in this document. Total government transfers estimated as CIRNAC ($319,705) + GNWT ($169,024) = $488,729; OSR = $4,761 + $8,925 = $13,686. Expenses by program approximate: Community Wellness mapped to health, Literacy/Daycare to education, United Way/Elder's Tea to social services.
